core_purpose: Help users keep outbound promises without stealing agency — integrity mirror, not autonomous coworker
mission: Detect commitments in conversation, offer delegated follow-through, surface status in C2, fail-closed on send
non_goals: Autonomous send without explicit user consent (initial phases)
Replacing C2 as bridge — C2 displays and routes; does not decide strategy
Full mobile device filesystem access from server

users.need: Keep word on follow-ups without busywork

success_criteria: Commitment detected from conversation with confidence score
Send path requires explicit confirm or graduated tier with cancel window
C2 thread shows commitment status and job linkage
Audit row for every outbound send attempt
failure_modes: C2 claimed as brain or blueprint authority
Council draft triggers send without confirm route

in_scope: MIT/commitment row when user declines automation
Draft generation via council (no unguarded send tool)

governance.c2_role: Bridge and cockpit — intake and status only
governance.strategy_source: This founder packet — not C2 chat
governance.builder_path: BPB → production builder after Product Development PASS

priority_note: P1 product spine per AMENDMENT_21; does not override factory 0031 queue order unless Adam explicitly reorders
